nasb.text: As for the rest of the beasts, their dominion was taken away, but an extension of life was granted to them for an appointed period of time.

esv.text: As for the rest of the beasts, their dominion was taken away, but their lives were prolonged for a season and a time.

cnv.text: 至於其餘的三獸，牠們的權柄都被奪去，牠們的生命卻得著延長，直到所定的時候和日期。

ccb.text: 至于其余的兽，它们的权柄都被夺去，但获准再存活一段时间。
